hero.title: Learn languages from real content.
hero.subtitle: Upload texts and articles. Dengwa extracts vocabulary, explains context – and practices with you until it actually sticks.

items.title: Your content, your language
items.description: Upload texts, articles or documents in your target language. No preset curriculum, no artificial examples.

items.title: AI spots what matters
items.description: Vocabulary is automatically extracted, explained and linked to context – straight into your personal flashcard deck.

items.title: Learn to speak by speaking
items.description: Practice in chat with an AI that knows your vocabulary and progress – not a generic conversation bot.

steps.label: Choose what you want to learn.
A text, article or document is all it takes.
Vocabulary is detected and saved automatically.
Spaced repetition makes sure it sticks.

etymology.text: Dengwa – from Proto-Indo-European *dn̥ǵʰwéh₂* (language, tongue) and Japanese 電話 (denwa) – Telephone, literally: electric language.

cta.title: Ready to understand real content?
cta.subtitle: Register for free. No subscription, no credit card.
